Boasting 130% sRGB and 95% DCI-P3 color gamut, it delivers stunning visuals with ultra-low motion blur and Adaptive-Sync for smooth, tear-free gameplay
With advanced AI visual enhancements, USB-C connectivity, and ergonomic adjustments, it’s built for next-level immersion and performance
